title: Audit Event
description: Single row of the append-only audit log. Emitted by the audit_logger.py PostToolUse hook and (for Task delegations) by the coordinator subagent. Consumed by the audit-log MCP server, the /audit-replay slash command, and by verify-firewall sanity checks. The schema is locked because legal replay depends on it.

parent_event_id.description: If this event was triggered by a parent (e.g., a coordinator Task call), reference it here.

agent_name.description: Subagent file name without .md (e.g., 'tdd-implementer') or 'main' for the top-level session.

tool.description: Tool name (Read, Edit, Write, Bash, Grep, Glob, Task, mcp__*, etc.).

input_hash.description: SHA-256 of the tool input. Hashed not stored to keep the log small and to avoid leaking tool inputs in shared logs.

input_summary.description: Selected non-sensitive input fields (e.g., for Read: just the path; for Bash: just the command name and first arg). Schema-free per tool.

decision.description: What firewall.py / cost_cap.py / the tool itself decided.

denial_reason.description: Set when decision == 'denied'. References a rule id from tool-policy.schema.json.

policy_version.description: Version of tool-policy.json in effect when the decision was made.

task_prompt_redaction.description: When tool == 'Task' (coordinator delegation): forbidden-token grep result. Logged so verify-firewall can replay.

cost_usd.description: Estimated cost contribution of this tool call to the session ledger.
